description_long: A group of nine beverage containers, including both bottles and cans, is arranged in a loose circle. The collection features a variety of energy drink brands such as Red Bull, Monster, and others, each with distinct branding and vibrant colors. The bottles are primarily made of plastic with screw caps, while the cans are metallic with pull-tab tops. The labels are highly detailed, displaying logos, product names, and graphic designs in bold fonts and contrasting colors. The containers vary in size, with the bottles being taller and the cans more compact, and all appear to be unopened and undamaged. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the commercial, ready-to-drink nature of the items.
description: A colorful assortment of energy drink bottles and cans, featuring detailed branding and smooth, glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Multiple energy drink bottles and cans are visible, with prominent Red Bull and Monster branding facing forward.
description_view_1: The rear labels and nutritional information of several cans and bottles are visible, with less branding facing the viewer.
description_view_2: Monster and Mountain Dew cans are most prominent, with a clear view of their front labels and vibrant colors.
description_view_3: Red Bull and a generic 'Energy Drink' can are at the front, with a black bottle and gold can visible to the side.
attribute_label_or_branding: Visible branding includes Red Bull, Monster, and other energy drink logos, with bold text and graphic designs in red, black, green, blue, and orange. Labels are wrapped around the cans and bottles, with some showing product names and others displaying nutritional information.
